audit_items.proof_trace: isValidSignature has an explicit zero-check at line 141-143 (revert InvalidZeroAmount). bid() lacks a direct check, but amount==0 yields bidUsdValue=0, which is always less than s_minBidUsdValue; s_minBidUsdValue is a strictly positive invariant (constructor and setMinBidUsdValue both call _setMinBidUsdValue which reverts on zero, and is the only write site). Therefore both entry points correctly reject zero-amount bids.
